query:
SELECT pq.categoryId, COUNT(*) as question_count, pc.positionId, pc.name as category_name 
FROM position_questions pq 
JOIN position_categories pc ON pq.categoryId = pc.id 
GROUP BY pq.categoryId, pc.positionId, pc.name 
ORDER BY pc.positionId, pq.categoryId;

FROM position_questions pq 
JOIN position_categories pc ON pq.categoryId = pc.id 
GROUP BY pq.categoryId, pc.positionId, pc.name 
ORDER BY pc.positionId, pq.categoryId;
